parameters.jsonBody: {"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 0, "method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2025-03-26", "capabilities": {}, "clientInfo": {"name": "n8n", "version": "1.0"}}}

nodes.name: [ENTRY] Ctx 提取

assignments.name: sid
assignments.value: ={{ $node["[ENTRY] Init MCP"].json.headers["mcp-session-id"] }}

assignments.name: title
assignments.value: ={{ $node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.title || "" }}

assignments.name: issueId
assignments.value: ={{ $node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.issueId || "" }}

assignments.name: projectId
assignments.value: ={{ $node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.projectId || "" }}

assignments.name: reqId
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const t = (() => { const blob = String($node["[ENTRY] Get Issue"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (text) { const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (Array.isArray(issue.tags)) return issue.tags; } } catch (e) {} } return ($node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.tags || []); })(); const r = (t || []).find(x => typeof x === 'string' && /^REQ-[A-Za-z0-9]+$/.test(x)); if (r) return r; const m = ($node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.title || '').match(/\[(REQ-[A-Za-z0-9]+)\]/); return m ? m[1] : ''; })() }}

assignments.name: prevIssueId
assignments.value: ={{ $node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.issueId || "" }}

assignments.name: tags
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify((() => { const blob = String($node["[ENTRY] Get Issue"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (text) { const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (Array.isArray(issue.tags)) return issue.tags; } } catch (e) {} } return ($node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.tags || []); })()) }}

assignments.name: routeKey
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const t = (() => { const blob = String($node["[ENTRY] Get Issue"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (text) { const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (Array.isArray(issue.tags)) return issue.tags; } } catch (e) {} } return ($node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.tags || []); })(); if (t.includes('reviewer')) return 'reviewer'; if (t.includes('test-fix')) return 'test-fix'; if (t.includes('bugfix')) return 'bugfix'; if (t.includes('verify')) return 'verify'; if (t.includes('accept')) return 'accept'; if (t.includes('dev')) return 'dev'; if (t.some(x => typeof x === 'string' && x.endsWith('-spec'))) return 'spec'; if (t.includes('archive')) return 'archive'; if (t.includes('analyze')) return 'analyze'; return 'unknown'; })() }}

assignments.name: resultKey
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const t = (() => { const blob = String($node["[ENTRY] Get Issue"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (text) { const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (Array.isArray(issue.tags)) return issue.tags; } } catch (e) {} } return ($node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.tags || []); })(); if (t.includes('decision:unsupported')) return 'unsupported'; if (t.includes('decision:needs-clarify')) return 'needs-clarify'; if (t.includes('diagnosis:test-bug')) return 'test-bug'; if (t.includes('diagnosis:spec-bug')) return 'spec-bug'; if (t.includes('result:pass')) return 'pass'; if (t.includes('result:fail')) return 'fail'; return ''; })() }}

assignments.name: originalTitle
assignments.value: ={{ ($node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.title || "").replace(/^(PASS|FAIL|TEST-BUG|SPEC-BUG|UNSUPPORTED|NEEDS-CLARIFY)\s+/, "").replace(/^\[REQ-[A-Za-z0-9]+\]\s*\[[A-Z\-]+\]\s*/, "").replace(/^\[REQ-[A-Za-z0-9]+\]\s*/, "") }}

assignments.name: priorStatusId
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[ENTRY] Get Issue"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (text) { const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (issue && issue.statusId) return issue.statusId; } } catch (e) {} } return ''; })() }}

nodes.notes:
从 webhook.body.tags 算 routeKey + resultKey + reqId
核心路由依据，title 完全不参与

nodes.name: [ROUTE] Is 验收?
nodes.notes: tags.includes("accept")

nodes.name: [ROUTE] Is Bug Fix?
nodes.notes: routeKey ∈ {bugfix, test-bugfix}

nodes.name: [ROUTE] Is 测试验证?
nodes.notes: tags.includes("verify")

nodes.name: [ROUTE] Is 开发?
nodes.notes: tags.includes("dev")（精确，不命中 dev-spec）

nodes.name: [ROUTE] Is Spec?
nodes.notes: 任一 tag 以 -spec 结尾

nodes.name: [ROUTE] Is 需求分析?
nodes.notes: tags.includes("analyze")

assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[SPEC] Cr 开发Spec"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (!text) continue; const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (issue && issue.id) return issue.id; } catch (e) {} } return ''; })() }}

={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"follow-up-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $json.iid }}","prompt":"## 开发 Spec

## 需求上下文
REQ: {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
详情见 openspec/changes/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}/proposal.md

### Git Branch
All work shares branch feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}:
1. git fetch origin
2. git checkout feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }} (create from main if not exists)
3. git pull origin feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }} || true
4. Do your work
5. git add . && git commit -m REQ-xx-commit
6. git push origin feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
Previous agents pushed their work here.

### 权威文档
openspec/changes/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}/ 是本需求的**唯一真相源**，内含 proposal.md（做什么为什么）、specs/（验收规格）、design.md（关键决策）。contract.spec.yaml 是 API 契约。**动工前必须通读**，所有决策以文档为准，不许凭空发挥。

通读 openspec + contract.spec.yaml，写 dev.spec.md：
- 文件结构（新增/修改哪些文件）
- 函数签名与职责
- 依赖项
- 错误处理策略
- 边界条件
- 存储/DB 需求（如有）
写到开发 agent 不用猜。Do NOT write code or tests. Commit and move to review."}}}

openspec/changes/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}/ 是本需求的**唯一真相源**，内含 proposal.md（做什么为什么）、specs/（验收规格）、design.md（关键决策）。contract.spec.yaml 是 API 契约。**动工前必须通读**，所有决策以文档为准，不许凭空发挥。

基于 contract.spec.yaml 写 contract_test.*：

nodes.name: [DEV] Query specs

parameters.jsonBody: ={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":10,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list-issues","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","limit":500}}}

nodes.notes: list-issues 准备给 AllSpecsReview? 算

nodes.name: [DEV] AllSpecsReview?

assignments.name: ok
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[DEV] Query specs"].json.data || ""); let arr = []; for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (text) arr = JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) {} } const reqId = $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId; const mine = arr.filter(it => Array.isArray(it.tags) && it.tags.includes(reqId)); const analyze = mine.find(it => Array.isArray(it.tags) && it.tags.includes('analyze')); let layers = null; if (analyze && Array.isArray(analyze.tags)) { const ls = analyze.tags.filter(t => typeof t === 'string' && t.startsWith('layer:')).map(t => t.slice(6)); if (ls.length > 0) layers = ls; } if (!layers && analyze && typeof analyze.title === 'string') { const m = analyze.title.match(/layers:([a-z,]+)/); if (m) layers = m[1].split(',').filter(Boolean); } const expected = ['dev-spec', 'accept-spec']; if (layers === null || layers.includes('backend')) expected.push('contract-spec'); if (layers && layers.includes('frontend')) expected.push('ui-spec'); if (layers && layers.includes('data')) expected.push('migration-spec'); const allReview = expected.every(tag => mine.some(s => Array.isArray(s.tags) && s.tags.includes(tag) && (s.statusId === 'review' || s.statusId === 'done'))); const devExists = mine.some(s => Array.isArray(s.tags) && s.tags.includes('dev')); return (allReview && !devExists) ? 'yes' : 'no'; })() }}

nodes.notes: 按 layers 算 expected specs；全 review + 没 dev → "yes"

nodes.name: [DEV] Gate
nodes.notes: AllSpecsReview? == "yes" 才放行创 开发

assignments.name: iid
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[DEV] Cr"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (!text) continue; const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (issue && issue.id) return issue.id; } catch (e) {} } return ''; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"follow-up-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $json.iid }}","prompt":"## 开发 (DEV)

AGENT_ROLE=dev-agent
REQ: {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}

## 你的职责
- 读 openspec/changes/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}/* 全部文档（proposal/design/specs/contract.spec/tasks.md Stage:Dev）
- 读 LOCKED 测试 tests/contract/* tests/acceptance/* 但**禁止修改**
- 实现业务代码 + unit test
- **不要在本地跑任何测试**

## 必须用 aissh-tao MCP 推到调试环境
- 写完一段 → mcp__aissh-tao__exec_run 把代码同步到 vm-node04
- BKD worktree 不运行业务代码，只编辑
- 跑测试是 verify-agent 的职责，dev 不跑

## Git
1. git pull origin feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
2. 实现完所有 Stage:Dev tasks
3. ONE 干净 commit + push
4. move review

禁改 contract_test.* / acceptance_test.* / openspec/specs/"}}}

assignments.name: iid
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[VERIFY] Cr"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (!text) continue; const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (issue && issue.id) return issue.id; } catch (e) {} } return ''; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"follow-up-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $json.iid }}","prompt":"## 测试验证 (VERIFY)

AGENT_ROLE=verify-agent
REQ: {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}

## 你的职责
你是独立验证者。在 vm-node04 调试环境跑该 REQ 的 contract test，**禁修任何代码**。

## 操作
1. git pull feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
2. 用 aissh-tao MCP on vm-node04 跑 contract test
3. 收集 pass/fail 结果

## ⚠️ 完成时必须做（不做这一步整个 pipeline 卡住）

**先 get-issue 拿当前 tags，然后 update-issue 写回新 tags 数组（保留原 tags 追加结果 tag）：**

- 全 PASS：追加 `result:pass`
- 任一 FAIL：追加 `result:fail` 和 `level:Lx`（哪层挂的）

示例（PASS）：
```
mcp__bkd__get-issue → 当前 tags=[verify, {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}]
mcp__bkd__update-issue(tags=[verify, {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}, result:pass])
```

然后 move review。**没加 result tag 就 move review = bug，会让 pipeline 误路由**。

## 详细报告
在 issue follow-up 里贴：每层 PASS/FAIL + 失败 test 名单 + 关键 stderr 行。"}}}

={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"update-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $node["[VERIFY] Id"].json.iid }}","statusId":"working"}}}

nodes.notes: resultKey == "pass"（agent 加的 result:pass tag）

parameters.jsonBody: ={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"create-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","title":"[{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}] [ACCEPT] {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.originalTitle }}","statusId":"todo","useWorktree":true,"tags":["accept","{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}"]}}}

assignments.name: iid
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[ACCEPT] Cr"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (!text) continue; const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (issue && issue.id) return issue.id; } catch (e) {} } return ''; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"follow-up-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $json.iid }}","prompt":"## 验收 (ACCEPT, e2e)

AGENT_ROLE=accept-agent
REQ: {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}

## 你的职责
在 ttpos-arch-lab ephemeral 环境跑端到端验收。

## 操作
1. git pull origin feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
2. mcp__aissh-tao__exec_run 拉起 ttpos-arch-lab ephemeral env（含 Playwright/Android emulator/DB/被测服务）
3. 跑 tests/acceptance/* + tests/ui/* (如有)
4. 写 openspec/changes/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}/reports/qa.md（自包含证据：scenario matrix + 测试输出 + screenshot）
5. tear down 环境

## 完成时必须
- 全 PASS：mcp__bkd__update-issue 追加 result:pass
- 任一 FAIL：追加 result:fail
- 漏加 = pipeline escalate

## 当前限制
ttpos-arch-lab 还没就绪。如果 mcp__aissh-tao__exec_run 拉不起环境 → 加 result:fail tag + comment 说明环境未就绪 + move review。**不要本地 build server 跑**——那是 verify 干的事。"}}}

={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"update-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $node["[ACCEPT] Id"].json.iid }}","statusId":"working"}}}

assignments.name: bugfixCount
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[BUGFIX] CB Query"].json.data || ""); let arr = []; for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (text) arr = JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) {} } const reqId = $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId; const mine = arr.filter(it => Array.isArray(it.tags) && it.tags.includes(reqId)); return mine.filter(s => Array.isArray(s.tags) && (s.tags.includes('bugfix') || s.tags.includes('test-bugfix'))).length; })() }}

assignments.name: round

parameters.jsonBody: ={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":99,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"follow-up-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.issueId }}","prompt":"熔断升级\nREQ {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }} (issue {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.issueId }})\nBug Fix 超过 3 轮仍未通过，自动修复失败。需要人工排查。"}}}

assignments.name: iid
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[BUGFIX] Cr"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (!text) continue; const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (issue && issue.id) return issue.id; } catch (e) {} } return ''; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"follow-up-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $json.iid }}","prompt":"## BUGFIX: DEV-FIX (code 视角)

AGENT_ROLE=dev-fix-agent
REQ: {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
本轮 Round: {{ $node["[BUGFIX] CB Count"].json.round }}

## 你的职责
上一个 verify 或 accept 失败了。你是**code 视角**的修复 agent。
- **只能改 internal/ cmd/ 业务代码 + unit test**（同文件）
- **禁改 tests/contract/ tests/acceptance/ tests/ui/**（pre-commit 会拦）
- **禁改 openspec/**

## 流程
1. git fetch && git checkout -b stage/bugfix-dev-{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}-round-{{ $node["[BUGFIX] CB Count"].json.round }} origin/feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
2. 读上一个失败 issue 的 session log（get-issue-logs），搞清楚哪个 test 挂了为啥挂
3. 先诊断：
   - spec 清楚说行为 X，test 正确验 X，code 输出 Y → **CODE BUG**，改代码
   - test 验了 spec 没说的东西 / 断言错 / 竞态 → **TEST BUG**，**不改代码**，加 tag `diagnosis:test-bug` move review（test-fix agent 会接手）
   - spec 本身模糊/漏场景 → **SPEC BUG**，加 tag `diagnosis:spec-bug` move review（会升级人工）
4. CODE BUG 流程：
   - 用 aissh-tao MCP 推 vm-node04 跑原失败的 contract test，复现
   - 修业务代码，确保不改测试文件
   - 本分支 commit + push（**不 merge 到 feat，reviewer 决定**）
5. move review

## ⚠️ 标签约束
- **不加 result:pass / result:fail**（result 只给 verify/accept）
- 诊断为 TEST BUG → 加 diagnosis:test-bug
- 诊断为 SPEC BUG → 加 diagnosis:spec-bug
- CODE BUG（默认）→ 不加 diagnosis tag"}}}

nodes.name: [ANALYZE] Is UNSUPPORTED?
nodes.notes: resultKey ∈ {unsupported, needs-clarify} → escalate

nodes.name: [ESCALATE] Is SPEC-BUG?
nodes.notes: resultKey == "spec-bug"（bugfix 诊断）→ escalate

parameters.content:
# V3 BKD Events

BKD `session.completed` webhook → routeKey/resultKey 路由

**所有判定走 tags，title 不参与**

## ROUTE

按 routeKey 一级分流

6 个 IF 节点

## ✓ DONE

验收 PASS → 完成

## VERIFY PASS → 创验收

测试验证 result:pass

## BUG FIX 链

验证/验收 FAIL → CB 熔断检查 → 创 Bug Fix

## VERIFY 重建

dev / bugfix / test-bugfix 完成 → 重建测试验证

## TEST BUG FIX

bugfix 诊断 = TEST-BUG → 创 Test Bug Fix

## SPEC BUG → ESCALATE

bugfix 诊断 = SPEC-BUG → 升级人工

## DEV

Spec gate (按 layers 算 expected) → 创开发

## SPEC FAN-OUT

需求分析完成 → 3 路并行 Spec

开发Spec / 契约测试Spec / 验收测试Spec

（layers 字段决定 expected 数量）

## UNSUPPORTED

analyze 决议不支持 → escalate

nodes.name: [ENTRY] Get Issue

parameters.jsonBody: ={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":50,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Hook"].json.body.issueId }}"}}}

nodes.notes: BKD webhook payload 不带 tags，反查 issue 拿 tags 喂给 Ctx 算 routeKey/resultKey

nodes.name: [ANALYZE] List Issues

parameters.jsonBody: ={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":99,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list-issues","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","limit":200}}}

nodes.notes: 防 ANALYZE 重复触发：fan-out 前查 list-issues，已存在 spec issue 就跳过

nodes.name: [ANALYZE] No Spec Yet?

string.value1: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[ANALYZE] List Issues"].json.data || ""); let arr = []; for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (text) arr = JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) {} } const reqId = $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId; const has = arr.some(s => Array.isArray(s.tags) && s.tags.includes(reqId) && s.tags.some(t => typeof t === 'string' && t.endsWith('-spec'))); return has ? "no" : "yes"; })() }}

nodes.notes: true (yes) = 没有任何 spec issue → 放行 fan-out；false (no) = 已存在 → 跳过避免重复

nodes.name: [ENTRY] Is My Project?
nodes.notes: 过滤无效 webhook（缺 projectId）。任意有 projectId 的 BKD project 都接。

assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[DONE] Cr"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (!text) continue; const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (issue && issue.id) return issue.id; } catch (e) {} } return ''; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"follow-up-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $json.iid }}","prompt":"## DONE 收尾 (ARCHIVE + PR)

AGENT_ROLE=archive-agent
REQ: {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}

ACCEPT 已通过。请做收尾：

1. cd feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }} 分支（已包含全部实现 + tests）
2. 跑 `openspec apply {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}` 把 spec-delta 升级到 openspec/specs，change 归档到 openspec/changes/archive/
3. git add . && git commit -m "archive: {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}"
4. git push origin feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
5. 用 gh CLI 提 PR：gh pr create --base master --head feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }} --title "[{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}] {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.originalTitle }}" --body "sisyphus auto-pipeline"
6. update-issue 追加 tag pr:<PR-编号>（如 pr:42）
7. 用 mcp__bkd__list-issues 找 tag=[analyze, {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}] 的 ANALYZE 原 issue，follow-up-issue 通知人：REQ {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }} 已完成，PR <URL>
8. move review

完成后整个 sisyphus pipeline 结束。"}}}

assignments.name: iid
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const blob = String($node["[TFIX] Cr"].json.data || ''); for (const line of blob.split('\n')) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; try { const obj = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const text = obj.result && obj.result.content && obj.result.content[0] && obj.result.content[0].text; if (!text) continue; const issue = JSON.parse(text); if (issue && issue.id) return issue.id; } catch (e) {} } return ''; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"follow-up-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $json.iid }}","prompt":"## BUGFIX: TEST-FIX (test 视角)

AGENT_ROLE=test-fix-agent
REQ: {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
本轮 Round: {{ $node["[BUGFIX] CB Count"].json.round }}

## 你的职责
你是**test 视角**的修复 agent。上一个 dev-fix agent 刚试过从 code 视角修。你现在只能：
- **改 tests/** (contract/acceptance/unit 都可)
- **禁改 internal/ cmd/** 业务代码（pre-commit 会拦）

## 流程
1. git fetch && git checkout -b stage/bugfix-test-{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}-round-{{ $node["[BUGFIX] CB Count"].json.round }} origin/feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
2. 读 dev-fix issue 上的 diagnosis（get-issue 查上一个 bugfix 的 tags 和 follow-up）
3. 站 test 视角审视当前 contract test：
   - spec 说 X，test 是不是验了非 X？ → 改 test
   - test 有竞态/顺序依赖？ → 改 test
   - test 对 feature 没覆盖？ → 加 test
4. 用 aissh-tao MCP 推 vm-node04 跑 contract test
5. 本分支 commit + push (**不 merge 到 feat，reviewer 决定**)

## 完成时约束
- 如果你判断 test 完全没问题，code 才是错的：**不改任何文件**，加 tag `diagnosis:code-bug` → move review
- 如果 spec 本身模糊：加 `diagnosis:spec-bug` → move review（reviewer 也会看到 → 可能 escalate）
- 正常改完：**不加 result tag**（result 只给 verify/accept）→ move review

**不管结果如何都 move review**，下一步 reviewer 会来 judge 两个分支。"}}}

={"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"follow-up-issue","arguments":{"projectId":"{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.projectId }}","issueId":"{{ $json.iid }}","prompt":"## BUGFIX: REVIEWER (裁判)

AGENT_ROLE=reviewer-agent
REQ: {{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}
本轮 Round: {{ $node["[BUGFIX] CB Count"].json.round }}

## 你的职责
前两步：
- stage/bugfix-dev-{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}-round-N 分支：dev-fix agent 的改动（改 code）
- stage/bugfix-test-{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }}-round-N 分支：test-fix agent 的改动（改 test）

你要：
1. git fetch origin
2. 对每个候选分支，cherry-pick 到 feat/{{ $node["[ENTRY] Ctx 提取"].json.reqId }} 的临时分支 → 用 aissh-tao MCP 跑 contract test
3. 采纳规则：
   - 只 dev-fix 通过 → merge dev-fix 到 feat
   - 只 test-fix 通过 → merge test-fix 到 feat
   - 两边都通过 → 默认 merge dev-fix（优先改代码，不改契约）
   - 两边都不通过 → 不 merge，加 tag `result:fail` + 写 diff 对比报告
4. 加 tag：
   - merge 了 → `result:pass`
   - 都不通过 → `result:fail`
5. move review"}}}

nodes.notes: reviewer 采纳结果：pass→重跑 verify；其它→escalate
